name: STICKMAN BOXING KO CHAMPIAN
description: You like boxing games and stickman games? This game is made for you! Enter the ring and play as an heroic Stickman Boxer. This new boxing game is available for all stickman fans! Fight 4 professionals in intense combat. Fight using a variety of devastating punches and combos. Jab, cross, uppercut, give in all you have, but don’t forget to dodge!.
instructions: Fight using a variety of devastating punches and combos
tags: 3D, Action, Arcade, Boxing, Fight, Fighting, HTML, HTML5, Stickman
